login.title: Sign in to lazyit
login.subtitle: You will be redirected to your organization's identity provider to authenticate.
login.ssoHelper: lazyit uses your organization's single sign-on (SSO). No separate password is needed.
login.unconfiguredTitle: This instance isn't set up yet
login.unconfiguredDetail: No administrator exists, so there is no one to sign in. Run the one-time setup to create the first administrator.

errors.configurationDetail: lazyit could not reach its identity provider. Check the OIDC environment variables (issuer, client id and secret) and that the provider is running, then try again.
errors.accessDeniedDetail: Your identity provider declined the sign-in. Your account may not be permitted to access this lazyit instance — contact your administrator.
errors.verificationDetail: The sign-in request could not be verified or has expired. Start the sign-in again.
errors.defaultDetail: Something went wrong while signing you in. Please try again; if it keeps happening, contact your administrator.
